'''shovawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:jeanlike|jeanlike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-v-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jeanlike|jeanlike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shovawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shovawithi|shovawithi]] || [[word:shovawiji|shovawiji]] || [[word:shovawishi|shovawishi]] || [[word:shovawiki|shovawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shovawuthuthu|shovawuthuthu]] || [[word:shovawujuju|shovawujuju]] || [[word:shovawushushu|shovawushushu]] || [[word:shovawukuku|shovawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shovawuthu|shovawuthu]] || [[word:shovawuju|shovawuju]] || [[word:shovawushu|shovawushu]] || [[word:shovawuku|shovawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shovawufthuf|shovawufthuf]] || [[word:shovawufjuf|shovawufjuf]] || [[word:shovawufshuf|shovawufshuf]] || [[word:shovawufkuf|shovawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shovawethe|shovawethe]] || [[word:shovaweje|shovaweje]] || [[word:shovaweshe|shovaweshe]] || [[word:shovaweke|shovaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shovawothotho|shovawothotho]] || [[word:shovawojojo|shovawojojo]] || [[word:shovawoshosho|shovawoshosho]] || [[word:shovawokoko|shovawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shovawotho|shovawotho]] || [[word:shovawojo|shovawojo]] || [[word:shovawosho|shovawosho]] || [[word:shovawoko|shovawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shovawofthof|shovawofthof]] || [[word:shovawofjof|shovawofjof]] || [[word:shovawofshof|shovawofshof]] || [[word:shovawofkof|shovawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shovawĂŻfthĂŻf|shovawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shovawĂŻfjĂŻf|shovawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shovawĂŻfshĂŻf|shovawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shovawĂŻfkĂŻf|shovawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shovawĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|shovawĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shovawĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|shovawĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shovawĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|shovawĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shovawĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|shovawĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shovawĂŻfthĂŻf|shovawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shovawĂŻfjĂŻf|shovawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shovawĂŻfshĂŻf|shovawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shovawĂŻfkĂŻf|shovawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shovawĂŻfthĂŻf|shovawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shovawĂŻfjĂŻf|shovawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shovawĂŻfshĂŻf|shovawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shovawĂŻfkĂŻf|shovawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shovawĂŠthĂŠ|shovawĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:shovawĂŠjĂŠ|shovawĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:shovawĂŠshĂŠ|shovawĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:shovawĂŠkĂŠ|shovawĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shovawathatha|shovawathatha]] || [[word:shovawajaja|shovawajaja]] || [[word:shovawashasha|shovawashasha]] || [[word:shovawakaka|shovawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shovawatha|shovawatha]] || [[word:shovawaja|shovawaja]] || [[word:shovawasha|shovawasha]] || [[word:shovawaka|shovawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shovawafthaf|shovawafthaf]] || [[word:shovawafjaf|shovawafjaf]] || [[word:shovawafshaf|shovawafshaf]] || [[word:shovawafkaf|shovawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shovawasha|shovawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shovawshĂ«sha|shovawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shovawrosha|shovawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shovawmusha|shovawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shovawyasha|shovawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshovawnkshĂ«sha|goshovawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshovawnkrosha|goshovawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshovawnkmusha|goshovawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshovawnkyasha|goshovawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shovavawasha|shovavawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shovavawshĂ«sha|shovavawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shovavawrosha|shovavawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shovavawmusha|shovavawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shovavawyasha|shovavawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshovavawnkshĂ«sha|goshovavawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshovavawnkrosha|goshovavawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshovavawnkmusha|goshovavawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshovavawnkyasha|goshovavawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shevĂŠwasha|shevĂŠwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shevĂŠwshĂ«sha|shevĂŠwshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shevĂŠwrosha|shevĂŠwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shevĂŠwmusha|shevĂŠwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shevĂŠwyasha|shevĂŠwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshevĂŠwnkshĂ«sha|goshevĂŠwnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshevĂŠwnkrosha|goshevĂŠwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshevĂŠwnkmusha|goshevĂŠwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshevĂŠwnkyasha|goshevĂŠwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shovfawasha|shovfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shovfawshĂ«sha|shovfawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shovfawrosha|shovfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shovfawmusha|shovfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shovfawyasha|shovfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshovfawnkshĂ«sha|goshovfawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshovfawnkrosha|goshovfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshovfawnkmusha|goshovfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshovfawnkyasha|goshovfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
